input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.2.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.2.1.1
            TITLE: vehicles must be presented for technical inspection in finished condition, fully assembled,

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.2.1.1: Vehicles must be presented for Technical Inspection in finished condition, fully assembled,
IN.2.1.1 Vehicles must be presented for Technical Inspection in finished condition, fully assembled, 
complete and ready to run.

final_answer: Vehicles must be presented for Technical Inspection in finished condition, fully assembled, complete and ready to run.
